description: Complete control-plane CLI for Paperclip — fleet status, approvals, costs, and issue management in one fast binary.

novel_features.name: Agent fleet dashboard
novel_features.description: Aggregates live status, costs, active issues, and idle time across all agents in a company in a single view — no single API call provides this.

novel_features.name: Cost anomaly detection
novel_features.description: Flags agents whose current spending deviates significantly from their rolling 7/30-day average using locally-cached cost history.

novel_features.name: Pending approval queue
novel_features.description: Shows pending approvals cross-joined with their linked issues, waiting agents, and time-in-queue — not exposed in any single endpoint.

novel_features.name: Agent activity timeline
novel_features.description: Reconstructs an agent's run history from heartbeat-runs, task-sessions, and comments into a chronological human-readable stream.

novel_features.name: Stale issue finder
novel_features.description: Finds in-progress issues with no agent activity in N days by cross-filtering runs and comments by timestamp.

novel_features.name: Cost drilldown by issue
novel_features.description: Correlates cost events with heartbeat runs linked to a specific issue — a multi-step join no single endpoint exposes.

novel_features.name: Routine health monitor
novel_features.description: Cross-checks all routine runs for consecutive failures, overdue schedules, and high error rates.
